Change 1: Replace:
  # Group triples by subject
      from collections import defaultdict
      groups = defaultdict(list)
      for t in triples:
          groups[t.subject].append(t)
  
      sentences = []
      for subj, items in groups.items():
          parts = [phrase(subj, t.predicate, t.object) for t in items]
          # Join parts with commas and a final conjunction
          if len(parts) == 1:
              sent = parts[0]
          else:
              sent = ", ".join(parts[:-1]) + ", and " + parts[-1]
          sentences.append(sent)
  
      # Combine subject sentences
      return " ".join(sentences).strip() + "."
with:
  # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
      # Combine mission/crewMembers triples into a single sentence when possible
      # ----------------------------------------------------------------------
      from collections import defaultdict
  
      # Map mission -> set of astronaut names
      mission_to_astronauts = defaultdict(list)
      # Keep track of which triples have been consumed for the combined sentence
      consumed = set()
  
      for idx, t in enumerate(triples):
          pred = t.predicate.lower().replace(" ", "")
          if pred == "mission":
              mission = t.object.strip().strip('"')
              astronaut = t.subject
              mission_to_astronauts[mission].append((astronaut, idx))
              consumed.add(idx)
          elif pred == "crewmembers":
              mission = t.subject
              astronaut = t.object
              mission_to_astronauts[mission].append((astronaut, idx))
              consumed.add(idx)
  
      combined_sentences = []
      for mission, astro_idx_list in mission_to_astronauts.items():
          astronauts = [a for a, _ in astro_idx_list]
          # If only one astronaut, fall back to normal phrasing later
          if len(astronauts) == 1:
              # Mark this triple as not consumed so it will be handled by generic logic
              consumed.discard(astro_idx_list[0][1])
